title: Evolutionary Biology Deep II: Fitness Landscapes, Speciation & Punctuated Equilibrium

nk_fitness_landscape.key_insight: NK landscape: # optima = EML-1; each local basin = EML-1 exponential stability

wright_fisher_dynamics.key_insight: Fixation = EML-1 (Kimura formula); speciation threshold crossing = EML-∞

punctuated_equilibrium.key_insight: Stasis = EML-1 (mean reversion, exponential stability). Sexual selection runaway = EML-1 (exponential growth). Speciation/punctuation = EML-∞ (non-analytic morphological jump).

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Topology of genotype space, coalescence counts
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: NK local optima count, adaptive walk convergence, fixation probability, stasis, runaway
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Drift variance, reproductive isolation, ruggedness ratio, stasis information
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Speciation threshold crossing, punctuation events, extinction (irreversible)

key_theorem: The EML Evolutionary Depth Theorem: All gradual evolutionary processes (drift, selection, stasis) are EML-1 or EML-2. The discrete, irreversible events of evolutionary history — speciation, extinction, punctuated equilibrium jumps — are EML-∞: they cannot be expressed as finite compositions of exp and ln over the continuous state space.
rabbit_hole_log: NK optima count = EML-1: same structure as Boltzmann partition function
Kimura fixation = EML-1: (1-exp)/(1-exp) — ratio of two EML-1 atoms
Reproductive isolation = 1-exp(-mu*t): EML-1 in time, EML-2 as depth (involves ln in inversion)
Punctuation events: sharp limit of sigmoid → step function = EML-∞
Sexual selection runaway = EML-1 until fitness cost triggers EML-∞ crash/speciation

connections.S57_stat_mech: Boltzmann factor structure = NK local optima count (both EML-1)
connections.S62_pde: OU process in stasis = EML-1 (same as Ornstein-Uhlenbeck = mean-reverting SDE)
connections.S75_qft: Phase transition in speciation = EML-∞ (same class as QCD confinement)
connections.S130_grand_synthesis_7: Speciation is irreversible: asymmetry Δd=∞ (EML-∞ barrier)
